---
title: "Dark Theme"
subtitle: "Clean and modern"
author: Demo
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: moon
    slide-number: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    embed-resources: true
    transition: none
---

## Dark backgrounds, light text

This theme uses a **dark navy background** with light text — great for projecting in dimly-lit rooms.

- Headers stand out in bold
- Links are [easy to spot](https://example.com)
- Tables look clean against dark backgrounds

| Feature | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| Tables | Yes |
| Code blocks | Yes |
| Callout boxes | Yes |
| Two-column layouts | Yes |

## Side-by-side content

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Left column**

Put your key points here. Columns work well for comparisons, pros/cons, and before/after.
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Right column**

The audience sees both sides at once — no scrolling, no flipping back.
:::
::::
